entities.name: Predictable Business Paradigm
entities.context: The old world of business characterized by stability assumptions and resistance to internal critique

entities.name: Critique Suppression
entities.context: The cultural norm of keeping quiet about flawed plans to avoid being labeled negatively

entities.name: Team Player Conformity
entities.context: Social pressure to not rock the boat, used to silence dissent

entities.name: Collective Dysfunction
entities.context: Organizational failure resulting from rational actors choosing silence over honest feedback

relationships.context: The old business environment made critiquing flawed plans risky
Pointing out flaws got people labeled as not team players
Rational silence in response to conformity pressure led to organizational dysfunction
